texto: The struggle to keep aroused emotions within proper boundaries is won by putting a conscious leash on them and leading them like junkyard dogs right to the throne of grace
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jim Andrews: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “The struggle to keep aroused emotions within proper boundaries is won by putting a conscious leas…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, faith, grace-of-god pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de grace-of-god e trust.

frase_original: The struggle to keep aroused emotions within proper boundaries is won by putting a conscious leash on them and leading them like junkyard dogs right to the throne of grace

texto: ... we live in a purposeful world with a linear movement to a grand climax. Thousands of sub-plots unfold enroute to the great finale. Behind your life is an unseen and up fathomed blueprint where every experience is purposeful. Within this divine plan we are not robots, but responsible moral agents. We make choices and we are responsible for these choices. But God, in a way that you and I will never fathom, integrates into his plan our choices long before they are ever made.
explicacao: Citação de Jim Andrews sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “... we live in a purposeful world with a linear movement to a grand climax. Thousands of sub-plot…” articula reflexao, choices, plans em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como plans e truth-of-life.

frase_original: ... we live in a purposeful world with a linear movement to a grand climax. Thousands of sub-plots unfold enroute to the great finale. Behind your life is an unseen and up fathomed blueprint where every experience is purposeful. Within this divine plan we are not robots, but responsible moral agents. We make choices and we are responsible for these choices. But God, in a way that you and I will never fathom, integrates into his plan our choices long before they are ever made.
